BURN_POWER.title: Ignite
BURN_POWER.description: At the start of turn, lose HP equal to the stack count, and at the end of turn, increase the stack count by [blue]1[/blue].
TOOL.title: Tool X
TOOL.description:
The count cap is X. You can recover the count of all [gold]Tool[/gold] relics to their cap at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold].
Right-click this relic to consume [blue]1[/blue] count and add a [blue]0[/blue]-cost [gold]Exhaust[/gold] card with a specified effect to your hand (except for certain relics with direct effects).
